info.title: apaleo Inventory API - not safe for work
info.description: Continuously evolving version - use at your own risk! Setup and manage properties (hotels, etc.) and all the entites in them to rent out: Units such as rooms, parking lots, beds, meeting rooms, etc. Units can be combined into groups (single rooms, double rooms).

get.description:
Get the list of properties.
You need to be authorized (no particular scope required)

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter result by property status

parameters.name: includeArchived
parameters.description: Include archived properties in the result. If not set, or set to false, it only returns non-archived properties

parameters.name: countryCode
parameters.description: Filter result by country code

parameters.name: pageNumber
parameters.description: Page number to retrieve. Default: 1. If the page has no items, the API returns 204 No Content.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Items per page. Default: 500. Maximum: 500.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: List of all embedded resources that should be expanded in the response. Possible values are: actions. All other values will be silently ignored.

404.description: The Request-URI could not be found.

422.description: Validation errors in the request body or query params.

503.description: The server is currently unavailable. Please try later.

post.description:
Use this call to create a new property.
You must have at least one of these scopes: 'properties.create, setup.manage'.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description:
Unique key for safely retrying requests without accidentally performing the same operation twice. 
We'll always send back the same response for requests made with the same key, 
and keys can't be reused with different request parameters. Keys expire after 24 hours.

201.description: Creation of the new property was successful.

Location.description: The location of the created resource.

404.description: The Request-URI could not be found.

422.description: Validation errors in the request body or query params.

503.description: The server is currently unavailable. Please try later.

get.description:
Return total count of properties
You need to be authorized (no particular scope required)

404.description: The Request-URI could not be found.

422.description: Validation errors in the request body or query params.

get.description:
Get a property by id.
You need to be authorized (no particular scope required)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The id of the property.

parameters.name: languages
parameters.description: 'all' or comma separated list of two-letter language codes (ISO Alpha-2)

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: List of all embedded resources that should be expanded in the response. Possible values are: actions. All other values will be silently ignored.

404.description: The Request-URI could not be found.

422.description: Validation errors in the request body or query params.

patch.description:
Here's a list of allowed operations: - Replace Name - Add, replace and remove Description - Replace CompanyName - Add, replace and remove ManagingDirectors - Replace CommercialRegisterEntry - Replace TaxId - Replace Location - Add, replace and remove BankAccount - Replace PaymentTerms - Set IsTemplate
You must have at least one of these scopes: 'properties.manage, setup.manage'.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The id of the property.

404.description: The Request-URI could not be found.

422.description: Validation errors in the request body or query params.

503.description: The server is currently unavailable. Please try later.

delete.description:
Use this endpoint to delete a property and all related data: transactional, setup. The property must be in 'Test' status.
You must have at least one of these scopes: 'properties.manage, setup.manage'.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The id of the property

404.description: The Request-URI could not be found.

422.description: Validation errors in the request body or query params.

503.description: The server is currently unavailable. Please try later.

post.description:
Use this call to clone a specific property. This operation creates a new property with inventory and rate plans from the specified property.
You must have at least one of these scopes: 'properties.create, setup.manage'.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The id of the property.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description:
Unique key for safely retrying requests without accidentally performing the same operation twice. 
We'll always send back the same response for requests made with the same key, 
and keys can't be reused with different request parameters. Keys expire after 24 hours.

201.description: Cloning of the existing property was successful.

Location.description: The location of the created resource.

404.description: The Request-URI could not be found.

422.description: Validation errors in the request body or query params.

503.description: The server is currently unavailable. Please try later.

put.description:
Use this endpoint to archive an existing live property This operation set the IsArchived flag to true
You must have at least one of these scopes: 'properties.manage, setup.manage'.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The id of the property

404.description: The Request-URI could not be found.

422.description: Validation errors in the request body or query params.

put.description:

You must have at least one of these scopes: 'properties.manage, setup.manage'.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The id of the property

put.summary: Reset a test property and delete all transactional data
put.description:
Use this endpoint to delete all transactional data related to some test property This operation deletes all transactional data related to the specified property. The property must be in 'Test' status.
You must have at least one of these scopes: 'properties.manage, setup.manage'.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The id of the property

get.description:
Get the list of units.
You must have at least one of these scopes: 'units.read, setup.read, setup.manage'.

parameters.name: propertyId
parameters.description: Return units for specific property

parameters.name: unitGroupId
parameters.description: Return units for the specific unit group - DEPRECATED: This property will be removed 20.04.2022. Use `UnitGroupIds` instead

parameters.name: unitGroupIds
parameters.description: Return units with the specific unit groups

parameters.name: unitAttributeIds
parameters.description: Return units with the specific unit attributes

parameters.name: isOccupied
parameters.description: Return only occupied or vacant units

parameters.name: maintenanceType
parameters.description: Return units with the specific maintenance type

parameters.name: condition
parameters.description: Return units with a specific condition

parameters.name: textSearch
parameters.description: This will filter all units where the provided text is contained in the unit name. The search is case insensitive.

parameters.name: pageNumber
parameters.description: Page number to retrieve. Default: 1. If the page has no items, the API returns 204 No Content.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Items per page. Default: 500. Maximum: 500.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: List of all embedded resources that should be expanded in the response. Possible values are: property, unitGroup, connectedUnits. All other values will be silently ignored.

OperationArray.description: Define the list of operations to be applied to the resource. Learn more about JSON Patch here: http://jsonpatch.com/.

name.description: The name for the unit group

description.description: The description for the unit group

memberCount.description: The number of units taken from this connected unit group

maxPersons.description: Maximum number of persons for the unit group

condition.description: The current status of the unit

maxPersons.description: Maximum number of persons for the unit

countryCode.description: The country code, in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code

memberCount.description: The number of units for this connected unit group

code.description: The code for the property that can be shown in reports and table views

companyName.description: The legal name of the company running the property.

managingDirectors.description: The managing director(s) of the company, as they should appear on invoices

commercialRegisterEntry.description: The entry in the Commercial Reigster of the company running the property, as it should appear on invoices

taxId.description: The Tax-ID of the company running the property, as it should appear on invoices

paymentTerms.description: The payment terms used for all rate plans

timeZone.description:
The time zone name of the property from the IANA Time Zone Database.
(see: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_tz_database_time_zones)

defaultCheckInTime.description:
The default check-in time
A time (without fractional second part) as defined in the ISO8601:2004

defaultCheckOutTime.description:
The default check-out time
A time (without fractional second part) as defined in the ISO8601:2004

currencyCode.description: The currency a property works with.

name.description: The name of the unit attribute

description.description: The description of the unit attribute

code.description: The code for the unit group that can be shown in reports and table views

propertyId.description: The id of the property where unit group will be created

name.description: The name for the unit group

description.description: The description for the unit group

maxPersons.description: Maximum number of persons for the unit group

rank.description:
The unit group rank
Restrictions:
- Should be greater or equal to one

connectedUnitGroups.description: The list of connected unit groups this unit group is composed of

propertyId.description: The id of the property where the unit will be created

unitGroupId.description: The id of the unit group

maxPersons.description: Maximum number of persons for the unit

attributes.description: Collection of user defined attributes of unit

connectedUnits.description: The list of units this unit is composed of

The code for the unit group that can be shown in reports and table views

name.description: The name for the unit group

description.description: The description for the unit group

code.description: The code for the property that can be shown in reports and table views

propertyTemplateId.description: The id of the property used as a template while creating the property

isTemplate.description: Whether the property can be used as a template for other properties

companyName.description: The legal name of the company running the property.

managingDirectors.description: The managing director(s) of the company, as they should appear on invoices

commercialRegisterEntry.description: The entry in the Commercial Register of the company running the property, as it should appear on invoices

taxId.description: The Tax-ID of the company running the property, as it should appear on invoices

paymentTerms.description: The payment terms used for all rate plans

timeZone.description:
The time zone name of the property from the IANA Time Zone Database.
(see: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_tz_database_time_zones)

currencyCode.description: The currency a property works with.

created.description:
Date of creation
A date and time (without fractional second part) in UTC or with UTC offset as defined in ISO8601:2004

actions.description: The list of actions for this property

PropertyListModel.example:
{
  "properties": [
    {
      "id": "MUC",
      "code": "MUC",
      "isTemplate": true,
      "name": "Demo Hotel Munich",
      "description": "This is the demo hotel Munich",
      "companyName": "Company",
      "commercialRegisterEntry": "CRE",
      "taxId": "Tax",
      "location": {
        "addressLine1": "Marienplatz 1",
        "postalCode": "80331",
        "city": "München",
        "countryCode": "DE"
      },
      "paymentTerms": {
        "de": "Zahlbar bei Check In",
        "en": "Payment on check-in"
      },
      "timeZone": "Europe/Berlin",
      "currencyCode": "EUR",
      "created": "0001-01-01T00:00:00Z",
      "status": "Test",
      "isArchived": false
    },
    {
      "id": "BER",
      "code": "BER",
      "propertyTemplateId": "MUC",
      "isTemplate": false,
      "name": "Demo Hotel Berlin",
      "description": "This is the demo hotel Berlin",
      "companyName": "Company",
      "commercialRegisterEntry": "CRE",
      "taxId": "Tax",
      "location": {
        "addressLine1": "Mohrenstraße 30",
        "postalCode": "10117",
        "city": "Berlin",
        "countryCode": "DE"
      },
      "paymentTerms": {
        "de": "Zahlbar bei Check In",
        "en": "Payment on check-in"
      },
      "timeZone": "Europe/Berlin",
      "currencyCode": "EUR",
      "created": "0001-01-01T00:00:00Z",
      "status": "Test",
      "isArchived": false
    }
  ],
  "count": 0
}

Maximum number of persons for the unit group.

id.description: The id for the scheduled maintenance

type.description:
The type of maintenance that is planned for the unit. A small repair (OutOfService),
a bigger disfunction that does not allow to sell the unit (OutOfOrder) or is it
even under construction and should reduce the house count (OutOfInventory)

maxPersons.description: Maximum number of persons for the unit

created.description:
Date of creation
A date and time (without fractional second part) in UTC or with UTC offset as defined in ISO8601:2004

attributes.description: Collection of user defined attributes of unit

id.description: The id for the scheduled maintenance

from.description:
Date and time the scheduled maintenance window starts
A date and time (without fractional second part) in UTC or with UTC offset as defined in ISO8601:2004

to.description:
Date and time the scheduled maintenance window ends
A date and time (without fractional second part) in UTC or with UTC offset as defined in ISO8601:2004

type.description:
The type of maintenance that is planned for the unit. A small repair (OutOfService),
a bigger disfunction that does not allow to sell the unit (OutOfOrder) or is it
even under construction and should reduce the house count (OutOfInventory)

description.description: The description text for the maintenance

maxPersons.description: Maximum number of persons for the unit

created.description:
Date of creation
A date and time (without fractional second part) in UTC or with UTC offset as defined in ISO8601:2004

attributes.description: Collection of user defined attributes of unit
